sources.title: NEQI Smooth Strength Rosemary Oil, 75 ml - Cosmeterie
sources.evidence: Exact product page identifies NEQI Smooth Strength Rosemary Oil, 75 ml; price 9.95 EUR; in stock; EAN 4063528086280; item number NF-NQ-HO-RO-201; manufacturer number NQ-HO-RO-201; product type oils; for all hair types; vegan, silicone-free and sulphate-free. Application says apply to palms or scalp, massage, leave at least 10 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. INCI starts with sweet almond oil, castor seed oil, safflower seed oil, rosemary leaf oil, mint leaf oil and lavender oil/extract.

sources.title: NEQI Smooth Strength Rosemary Oil, 75 ml - Cosmeterie Online Shop
sources.evidence: International product page corroborates exact product identity, 75 ml size, EAN 4063528086280, manufacturer number NQ-HO-RO-201, all-hair-types suitability, rich formula, silicone-free and sulphate-free claims, rinse-out application, and the same oil-dominant INCI.

sources.title: Neqi Hair Smooth Strength Rosemary Oil 75 ml - haar-shop.ch
sources.evidence: Independent retailer corroborates Smooth Strength Rosemary Oil, SKU 60081158, 75 ml size, EAN 4063528086280, in-stock status, hair oil category, all-hair-types suitability, vegan and sulfate-free claims, and rinse-out pre-wash usage after at least 10 minutes.

sources.title: NEQI Rosemary Oil 75ml - JohnBeerens.com
sources.evidence: Retailer page corroborates NEQI Rosemary Oil 75 ml, barcode 4063528086280, SKU NQ-HO-RO-101, all-hair-types suitability, oil-dominant INCI, and pre-wash usage. Its product image is a cleaner exact front bottle packshot suitable as the raw image candidate.

field_rationales.identifiers: Cosmeterie corroborates EAN, item number and manufacturer number; haar-shop.ch corroborates EAN and SKU 60081158; JohnBeerens corroborates barcode/EAN and its retailer SKU.
field_rationales.product.image_url: Selected the JohnBeerens direct PNG image because it is exact-product, single bottle, front-facing, clean white/light background, and avoids the dark reflection tail that blocked the previous Cosmeterie processed image.
field_rationales.product.price_eur: Cosmeterie.at lists the 75 ml product at 9.95 EUR.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: Removed the submitted brand prefix and normalized Rosmarin to the retailer-supported English product name: Smooth Strength Rosemary Oil.
field_rationales.product.category_key: Submitted category is oil and retailers list the product as oil/hair oil.
field_rationales.product.product_line: Smooth Strength appears consistently in the product name and on the visible product label; no product_line was supplied by brand resolution.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: Cosmeterie.at is an exact EUR purchase page and shows the item available at the time checked.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: Used resolved_brand.canonical_brand exactly as required: Neqi.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: Cosmeterie.at shows the item in stock and add-to-cart available.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_oil_eligibility: Reviewer feedback was correct that this is not a strict natural/single oil in Chaarlie terms. The INCI is a formulated blend of almond, castor, safflower, rosemary, mint and lavender oils plus camphor, menthol, tocopheryl acetate and fragrance allergens, so oil_subtype is mapped to styling-oel rather than natuerliches-oel. Usage evidence is consistently pre-wash/rinse-out after at least 10 minutes, so oil_purpose remains pre_wash_oiling. Retailers state all hair types, so rows cover fine, normal and coarse thickness with the same conservative rinse-out purpose.

review.notes: Auto-approved after processed image and properties were both approved.

field_rationales.product.currency: dm PDP price is a German EUR price, so currency is EUR.
field_rationales.product.image_url: Lyko remains the best raw image source: exact AUSSIE SOS Super Serum 100 Hours Hydration 160 ml product-only front packshot, plain light background, readable label, and 960 px source. The dm PDP image is exact and renderable but exposed as a smaller transformed asset, while Watsons includes more distracting page/promo visual context.

field_rationales.product.clean_name: Uses the German dm PDP identity without repeating the brand prefix: Leave-In Haarserum 100 Hours Hydration, 160 ml.
field_rationales.product.category_key: Submitted category is leave_in, dm breadcrumb places the product under Leave-In, and all exact PDPs describe no-rinse leave-in use.
field_rationales.product.product_line: SOS appears on the visible product label and in supporting exact PDP identities as Aussie SOS Super Serum.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: The reviewer-provided dm.de PDP is identity-correct, German-market, allowlisted, purchasable, and highest priority under dm > brand-direct > Rossmann > Amazon DE. Other preferred hosts were audited and do not beat the accepted dm source.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: brand_resolution_context.resolved_brand is null, but Nick approved reviewer_value.canonical_brand AUSSIE for this intake, so the DB-ready brand spelling is AUSSIE.

field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: Set to available because the accepted dm PDP shows In den Warenkorb, Lieferbar, and Standardversand 2-3 Werktage.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_checked_at: Timestamp records the live dm purchase availability check.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_specs: dm and supporting PDPs describe a no-rinse serum applied after shower or on the go to damp or dry hair, with moisture, detangling, anti-frizz, shine, and no evidenced heat protection.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_fit_spec: Medium booster-only fit is conservative because the product is a silicone/oil-containing serum with detangling and smoothing benefits, not a rinse-conditioner replacement and not a heat-protect product.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_eligibil: Eligibility focuses on normal/coarse hair with moisture_anti_frizz or shine_protect needs for air-dry and non-heat styling; fine hair is excluded because the formula is silicone/oil-rich and supporting review evidence flags greasiness risk on thin hair.

review.notes: Auto-approved after processed image and properties were both approved.

field_rationales.product.currency: EUR matches the selected German Rossmann price source.

field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_reran: Weight medium and repair_level medium are supported by the Rossmann and official care positioning plus ingredient profile; balance_direction balanced reflects combined conditioning/emollient agents plus hydrolyzed silk, sericin, keratin, glycerin, and glycosphingolipids.
